_note: Mini ChartQA smoke fixtures. Synthesised in-house from public-domain bar/line/pie charts; no upstream pixels checked in. Mix of numeric (relaxed ±5%) and categorical answers.

samples.question: What is the value for Q3?
Which category has the highest bar?
What percentage does the blue slice represent?
Between 2018 and 2020, did revenue increase or decrease?
What is the difference between the highest and lowest bar?
